name: case12_ingress_job
description: Case 12: Ingress modes - S3 pipe-delimited source with type casting to S3 gzip CSV (shared job for insert/truncate/upsert)
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - case12_ingress","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case12_ingress/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"pipe","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(AS_OF_DATE), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS AS_OF_DATE, NULLIF(TRIM(PRODUCT_CODE), '') AS PRODUCT_CODE, NULLIF(TRIM(PRODUCT_NAME), '') AS PRODUCT_NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(CATEGORY_CODE), '') AS CATEGORY_CODE, NULLIF(TRIM(CATEGORY_NAME), '') AS CATEGORY_NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(UNIT), '') AS UNIT, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(QUANTITY_IN_STOCK), '') AS INT) AS QUANTITY_IN_STOCK, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(COST_PRICE), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS COST_PRICE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SELL_PRICE), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS SELL_PRICE, NULLIF(TRIM(WAREHOUSE_CODE), '') AS WAREHOUSE_CODE, NULLIF(TRIM(LOCATION_CODE), '') AS LOCATION_CODE, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(STATUS), ''), 'A') AS STATUS, TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(TRIM(CREATED_AT), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS CREATED_AT, NULLIF(TRIM(CREATED_BY), '') AS CREATED_BY FROM myDataSource"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case12_ingress","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case12_ingress/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
